rationale: The cited paper is methodologically relevant to survey response-style bias (ERS in cross-national Likert data), which is plausibly related to the citing paper’s focus on language-induced measurement bias in international surveys. However, the provided evidence shows only a single DOI match and no in-text citation context, and the citing note does not indicate direct use of the cited IRT/testlet method. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
